prompt: A full-body pastel anime illustration of a cute teenage girl standing in a playful one-leg-raised pose against a clean off-white background. Her face is intentionally obscured by a smooth rectangular blur matching skin tones, creating an anonymous portrait effect. She has warm chestnut brown hair styled in a messy high bun with loose curled strands and side-swept volume, decorated with 2 lavender hair clips and a lavender scrunchie. She wears a soft oversized lavender cardigan with 2 flower patches on the chest area, a cream blouse with a small pink ribbon bow at the collar, and a pink plaid pleated mini skirt. Her accessories include 1 dangling flower earring visible on the right ear. She wears loose cream leg warmers with lavender stripe accents and pink lace-up sneakers with thick soles. The pose is slightly leaning back with both hands tucked in the cardigan pockets, one leg straight and the other bent upward behind her, conveying a sweet, stylish kawaii fashion vibe. Surround her with 4 large pale lavender circular shapes, 2 pink four-point stars, 2 golden sparkles, 2 lavender crescent shapes, 1 lavender flower icon, 3 tiny pink dots, and 3 tiny lavender dots, arranged as floating decorative elements. Use soft cel-shaded lighting, delicate linework, pastel pink and purple palette, polished character design, clean negative space, and a modern Japanese cute fashion illustration aesthetic.
